name: floating-position
title: Floating Position
description: Position floating content relative to a trigger element. Handles collision detection, auto-flipping to opposite sides, and viewport boundary shifting.

docs.description: Position floating content relative to a trigger element. Handles collision detection, auto-flipping to opposite sides, and viewport boundary shifting.

parameters.name: triggerRef
parameters.description: Ref to the trigger element that the floating content is positioned relative to.

parameters.name: open
parameters.description: Whether the floating content is open. Position is computed when true, reset to null when false.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Preferred side for positioning. Auto-flips if there isn't enough space.

parameters.name: sideOffset
parameters.description: Distance in pixels between the trigger and floating content along the side axis.

parameters.name: alignOffset
parameters.description: Offset in pixels along the alignment axis.

parameters.name: collisionPadding
parameters.description: Minimum distance in pixels from viewport edges when avoiding collisions.

parameters.name: avoidCollisions
parameters.description: Whether to automatically flip sides and shift position to stay within viewport.

returns.description: Object containing computed position and a ref for the floating content element.

properties.name: position
properties.description: Computed position with x, y coordinates and resolved side/align. Null when closed.

properties.name: contentRef
properties.description: Ref to attach to the floating content element. Used for measuring dimensions during positioning.

notes.title: Collision Detection
notes.content: When content would overflow the viewport, the hook tries the opposite side first, then cross-axis sides, and finally shifts the position to stay within bounds.

notes.title: Layout Effect
notes.content: Uses useLayoutEffect to compute position synchronously before paint, preventing visual flicker.

notes.title: Used By
notes.content: Built into PopoverContent for automatic positioning of popovers and tooltips.

content.text: font-mono text-sm border border-border px-3 py-1.5 bg-background hover:bg-muted transition-colors
z-50 w-48 border border-border bg-background p-3 font-mono text-sm shadow-md
